items.title: How Google Does It: An inside look at cybersecurity
items.content: Learn how Google approaches some of today's most pressing security topics, challenges and concerns, straight from Google experts.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how Google approaches some of today's most pressing security topics, challenges and concerns, straight from Google experts.
items.summary:
文章标题：谷歌如何应对网络安全：专家解读

摘要：本文介绍了谷歌专家对当前网络安全关键议题、挑战和关注点的看法。内容涵盖谷歌在网络安全方面的方法与策略，为读者提供深入了解。

items.title: Find out what’s new in the Gemini app in March's Gemini Drop.
items.content: Gemini Drops is our regular monthly update on how to get the most out of the Gemini app.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini Drops is our regular monthly update on how to get the most out of the Gemini app.
items.summary: 《三月Gemini更新速递：每月精选应用优化指南》。Gemini Drops为每月定期更新，旨在提供Gemini应用的最佳使用方法。

items.title: MLB pitches AI-powered commentary in its play-by-play app
items.content: MLB Scout Insights feature, powered by Gemini and Google Cloud AI, provides baseball commentary.
items.contentSnippet: MLB Scout Insights feature, powered by Gemini and Google Cloud AI, provides baseball commentary.
items.summary: MLB在其比赛解说应用中推出AI驱动的评论功能MLB Scout Insights，该功能由Gemini和Google Cloud AI提供支持，为棒球比赛提供解说服务。

items.title: We’re partnering with multiple national teams ahead of soccer’s biggest global showdown.
items.content: The countdown to a summer of unforgettable soccer is officially on! This year, we're helping fans explore the tournament, find inspiration and get closer to the action b…
items.contentSnippet: The countdown to a summer of unforgettable soccer is officially on! This year, we're helping fans explore the tournament, find inspiration and get closer to the action b…
items.summary: 我们将与多个国家队合作，为即将到来的足球全球大赛做筹备。今年，我们正帮助球迷探索赛事、寻找灵感，并更近距离感受足球的魅力。

items.title: The surprising photographers behind Google screensavers
items.content: Get the origin story behind the stunning wallpapers you see on Google TV Streamer, Nest Hub and other Google TV devices.
items.contentSnippet: Get the origin story behind the stunning wallpapers you see on Google TV Streamer, Nest Hub and other Google TV devices.
items.summary: 谷歌电视流媒体、Nest Hub等设备屏幕保护壁纸的惊人来源。文章揭示了这些精美壁纸背后的摄影师故事。

items.title: Make the switch: Bring your AI memories and chat history to Gemini
items.content: The Gemini app just made it easier to switch from another AI chat app, without starting from scratch.
items.contentSnippet: The Gemini app just made it easier to switch from another AI chat app, without starting from scratch.
items.summary: Gemini应用简化了从其他AI聊天应用迁移的过程，用户无需重新开始即可导入AI记忆和聊天历史。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.content: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.contentSnippet: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.summary: 在最新一期的《技术与社会对话》系列节目中，LL COOL J与James Manyika就人工智能与创造力进行了对话。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.content: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.contentSnippet: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.summary: 谷歌翻译耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆iOS平台，并扩展了iOS和安卓用户支持的国家范围。

items.title: Announcing the winners of the MedGemma Impact Challenge
items.content: The winners of the MedGemma Impact Challenge demonstrated the potential of Google’s open medical models for solving diverse healthcare challenges.
items.contentSnippet: The winners of the MedGemma Impact Challenge demonstrated the potential of Google’s open medical models for solving diverse healthcare challenges.
items.summary: 谷歌的MedGemma Impact Challenge获奖者展示了其开放医疗模型在解决多样化医疗挑战方面的潜力。

items.title: Upgrade your creative performance with March’s Demand Gen Drop.
items.content: Learn more about our latest Demand Gen Drop and ways to maximize campaign performance in Demand Gen campaigns.
items.contentSnippet: Learn more about our latest Demand Gen Drop and ways to maximize campaign performance in Demand Gen campaigns.
items.summary: 文章介绍了如何通过最新需求生成工具包提升创作表现，并提供了优化需求生成活动性能的方法。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.content: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live已在Google产品中上线，旨在使音频AI更加自然和可靠。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.content: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.contentSnippet: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.summary: Search Live 正在全球范围内扩展，覆盖所有支持AI模式的语言和地区。此次扩展旨在提升服务范围和用户体验，确保更多用户能够享受到AI驱动的搜索服务。

items.title: Build real-time conversational agents with Gemini 3.1 Flash Live
items.content: Google is launching Gemini 3.1 Flash Live via the Live API in Google AI Studio, for building realtime voice and vision agents.
items.contentSnippet: Google is launching Gemini 3.1 Flash Live via the Live API in Google AI Studio, for building realtime voice and vision agents.
items.summary: 谷歌通过Google AI Studio的Live API推出Gemini 3.1 Flash Live，用于构建实时语音和视觉对话代理。

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.content: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.contentSnippet: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.summary: Lyria 3是最新推出的音乐生成模型，现可通过Gemini API进行付费预览，并在Google AI Studio中进行测试。

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.content: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.
items.contentSnippet: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.
items.summary: Lyria 3 Pro将集成到更多Google产品中，帮助专业人士在常用工具上创建更长的音轨。该工具的更新旨在提升内容创作效率，使其更符合专业用户的需求。

items.title: 5 ways to collaborate with our agentic advisors

items.contentSnippet: Top tips and best practices for collaborating with Ads Advisor and Analytics Advisor

items.title: Quantum frontiers may be closer than they appear
items.content: An overview of how Google is accelerating its timeline for post-quantum cryptography migration.
items.contentSnippet: An overview of how Google is accelerating its timeline for post-quantum cryptography migration.
items.summary: 谷歌正加速其后量子密码学的迁移时间表。文章概述了其推进该进程的方式。

items.title: Ads Decoded episode 5 navigates the challenges and impact of effective lead gen advertising.
items.content: We’re breaking down the steps — from lead scoring to data hygiene — to enable your campaigns to deliver high quality lead volume.
items.contentSnippet: We’re breaking down the steps — from lead scoring to data hygiene — to enable your campaigns to deliver high quality lead volume.
items.summary: 《Ads Decoded》第五集探讨了有效线索生成广告的挑战与影响。节目详细解析了从线索评分到数据清洁的关键步骤，旨在帮助广告活动实现高质量线索的大量产出。

items.title: Google ranks #1 on Fast Company’s Most Innovative Companies list.
items.content: Google was just named #1 on Fast Company's 2026 World’s Most Innovative Companies list.

items.summary: 谷歌在Fast Company 2026年最具创新力公司榜单中排名第一。
